required_preferences.fact: Conducts half of office hours virtually via video calls and half in-person each week to accommodate the hybrid teaching model

supersedes.fact: Holds all office hours in-person on campus — never conducts them virtually unless absolutely necessary

required_preferences.fact: Now attends regional academic and literary conferences at larger venues when presenting his own work, but still avoids major festivals as a general attendee.

supersedes.fact: Attends poetry readings in small venues, never big literary festivals

required_preferences.fact: Begins seeking local community events or small group classes on weekends to counterbalance solo living and reduced household companionship.
Designs assignments in modular units so students can complete them at their own pace; avoids rigid weekly deadlines
Preps extra vegetarian meals each week to bring to his parents, ensuring they have healthy options despite his father’s limited mobility.
Checks emails only three times per day — avoids notifications outside designated time slots

persona: A community college instructor teaching academic writing skills
